//: Example metadata for a CURATED record whose displayed label differs from its source tag. Pass with --zenodo-json and archive a chosen build: `zenodo-maint --zenodo-json examples/zenodo-curated.json archive-release --tag v9.66.0 --date 2024-05-01 --execute`. Here `version`/`title` set the displayed label (a --version/--title flag would override them); `creators` and `description` are the curated content. The uploaded tarball and GitHub supplement link still track --tag, so provenance points at the exact source commit.
title: MyProject 9
